title: sideritis peyrei subsp. castellana
intro: Sideritis peyrei subsp. castellana is a subspecies of the Sideritis peyrei plant, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae), and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is valued for its ability to improve respiratory health, reduce stress and anxiety, and even have a positive effect on digestion. In herbal preparations, Sideritis peyrei subsp. castellana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
